items.q: Which writer co-created The Inbetweeners with Damon Beesley?
items.explanation: The Inbetweeners was created by Damon Beesley and Iain Morris.

items.q: David Lynch and Mark Frost created Twin Peaks.
items.explanation: Twin Peaks was created by David Lynch and Mark Frost.

items.q: Which decade did Deutschland 83 premiere in?
items.explanation: Deutschland 83 began in 2015, placing it in the 2010s.

items.q: Which network originally aired The Twilight Zone?
items.explanation: The Twilight Zone is an American media franchise based on the anthology television series created by Rod Serling in which characters find themselves dealing with often disturbing or unusual events, an experience described as entering "The.

items.q: In what year did Gomorrah premiere?
items.explanation: Gomorrah is an Italian crime drama television series created by Roberto Saviano for Sky Atlantic. Based on Saviano's book of the same name, the show premiered on Sky Atlantic in Italy on 6 May 2014.

items.q: In what year did Blackadder premiere?
items.explanation: Blackadder is a series of four period British sitcomsThe Black Adder, Blackadder II, Blackadder the Third and Blackadder Goes Forthplus several one-off installments, which originally aired on BBC1 from 1983 to 1989.

items.q: Which decade did The Fall premiere in?
items.explanation: The Fall began in 2013, placing it in the 2010s.
